N:=49;
R<u,v>:=PolynomialRing(Rationals(),2);
X:=u^17*v^21
        - u^12*(3*u^6 + 12*u^5 + 2*u^4 + 3*u^3 + u^2 - 1)*v^20
        + u^9*(3*u^10 + 38*u^9 + 73*u^8 + 39*u^7 + 40*u^6 + 9*u^5 - 2*u^4 - 11*u^3 - 3*u^2 - 3*u - 1)*v^19
        + u^6*(u^16 + 2*u^15 + 5*u^14 - 34*u^13 - 222*u^12 - 332*u^11 - 298*u^10 - 217*u^9 - 36*u^8 + 26*u^7 + 75*u^6 + 48*u^5 + 39*u^4 + 10*u^3 + 2*u^2 - 1)*v^18

x:=v;

    - 6679328136437*u^3*x^12 + 7268946864948*u^3*x^11 - 3660648214295*u^3*x^10 - 260696828985*u^3*x^9 + 1295520451749*u^3*x^8 - 899578283658*u^3*x^7 + 535256337965*u^3*x^6 - 172689107288*u^3*x^5 +

    20058913616*u*x^16 + 167419772107*u*x^15 - 400304527844*u*x^14 - 19115461692*u*x^13 + 1736574305590*u*x^12 - 3154236261728*u*x^11 + 2373971218996*u*x^10 - 881430688852*u*x^9 + 509892838351*u*x^8 -

    - 183626867739870*u^16*x^6 - 9069868872394*u^16*x^5 + 87317727281442*u^16*x^4 - 63236487714488*u^16*x^3 + 21164563456694*u^16*x^2 - 3023086247991*u^16*x + 94687013589*u^16 + 7811177418*u^15*x^16 - 
    123184741478*u^15*x^15 + 761626006091*u^15*x^14 - 208488928317*u^15*x^13 - 17825525022918*u^15*x^12 + 92218991622403*u^15*x^11 - 241869843010767*u^15*x^10 + 397614979131580*u^15*x^9 - 436222927906642*u^15*x^8
    + 310939859664540*u^15*x^7 - 105267171384455*u^15*x^6 - 48862246135140*u^15*x^5 + 88049252888974*u^15*x^4 - 53256328926834*u^15*x^3 + 16057529815397*u^15*x^2 - 2015096351359*u^15*x + 12847674716*u^15 - 
    42193434814*u^14*x^16 + 223873427003*u^14*x^15 - 123150215096*u^14*x^14 + 2493328629924*u^14*x^13 - 29644476390242*u^14*x^12 + 122355529368855*u^14*x^11 - 272848220626025*u^14*x^10 + 373015922654838*u^14*x^9 
    - 322311842947415*u^14*x^8 + 163727379065647*u^14*x^7 - 17885409596723*u^14*x^6 - 54708098192207*u^14*x^5 + 61244379937684*u^14*x^4 - 34251724589456*u^14*x^3 + 9854200852503*u^14*x^2 - 1078336063782*u^14*x + 
    13452231135*u^14 + 41238811141*u^13*x^17 - 422622959000*u^13*x^16 + 1227606442149*u^13*x^15 - 289315536399*u^13*x^14 - 1334495513833*u^13*x^13 - 17644097648184*u^13*x^12 + 84034887682883*u^13*x^11 - 
    164244423768318*u^13*x^10 + 167509859395842*u^13*x^9 - 81023064444036*u^13*x^8 + 2876368540166*u^13*x^7 + 17289086273373*u^13*x^6 - 20831640957239*u^13*x^5 + 25150853424807*u^13*x^4 - 17305379733667*u^13*x^3 
    + 5653183491661*u^13*x^2 - 746992616720*u^13*x + 33928282716*u^13 + 5845551852*u^12*x^18 - 15619230947*u^12*x^17 + 50692706562*u^12*x^16 - 1276449437755*u^12*x^15 + 7594584664514*u^12*x^14 - 
    20290396713082*u^12*x^13 + 29945147361877*u^12*x^12 - 29889963904117*u^12*x^11 + 39348971193595*u^12*x^10 - 76223379516378*u^12*x^9 + 99525310726379*u^12*x^8 - 59403473906919*u^12*x^7 - 1674817184572*u^12*x^6
    + 16321508301124*u^12*x^5 + 238308688422*u^12*x^4 - 6862114241404*u^12*x^3 + 2814445379621*u^12*x^2 - 269011378172*u^12*x - 7851565057*u^12 - 7811177418*u^11*x^19 + 77300417879*u^11*x^18 - 
    303137990232*u^11*x^17 + 797887481914*u^11*x^16 - 3107971405090*u^11*x^15 + 13379000372506*u^11*x^14 - 39518262712523*u^11*x^13 + 79390512390052*u^11*x^12 - 120938847493038*u^11*x^11 + 
    160012859981303*u^11*x^10 - 187880835989448*u^11*x^9 + 162220951551969*u^11*x^8 - 69085842045236*u^11*x^7 - 17244581278218*u^11*x^6 + 34401002967821*u^11*x^5 - 12918478393814*u^11*x^4 + 121536809784*u^11*x^3 
    + 616284606552*u^11*x^2 - 4773261757*u^11*x - 16790521994*u^11 + 19433947*u^10*x^19 - 18203137195*u^10*x^18 + 145460896738*u^10*x^17 + 859276858*u^10*x^16 - 3702606328057*u^10*x^15 + 17950501896633*u^10*x^14 
    - 45439306957414*u^10*x^13 + 81008970808342*u^10*x^12 - 126343648584314*u^10*x^11 + 183214377736333*u^10*x^10 - 214642049520136*u^10*x^9 + 165448475421455*u^10*x^8 - 53963966120462*u^10*x^7 -

    - 27941454880*u^9*x^17 + 979662211602*u^9*x^16 - 4893884766849*u^9*x^15 + 13405682072461*u^9*x^14 - 27368631018381*u^9*x^13 + 54686471082831*u^9*x^12 - 103485432743150*u^9*x^11 + 152357134852059*u^9*x^10 - 
    156779503174426*u^9*x^9 + 100129220024799*u^9*x^8 - 19159655414503*u^9*x^7 - 29544860828698*u^9*x^6 + 28752740401709*u^9*x^5 - 10195932415721*u^9*x^4 + 1055625746196*u^9*x^3 + 96842623913*u^9*x^2 - 
    7060988406*u^9*x + 5013076939*u^8*x^18 - 74761010585*u^8*x^17 + 411280440024*u^8*x^16 - 1370138036272*u^8*x^15 + 4124776597751*u^8*x^14 - 12496038020746*u^8*x^13 + 29572515553096*u^8*x^12 -

    1059625728443*u^8*x^3 - 101980822722*u^8*x^2 + 11317909003*u^8*x + 479747327*u^7*x^18 + 25506497362*u^7*x^17 - 165361315143*u^7*x^16 + 152110711764*u^7*x^15 + 931183206014*u^7*x^14 - 1685919695342*u^7*x^13 - 
    3201412364641*u^7*x^12 + 12277725566674*u^7*x^11 - 12411195572830*u^7*x^10 + 704039367760*u^7*x^9 + 5798783789729*u^7*x^8 + 1671564510786*u^7*x^7 - 10095372113387*u^7*x^6 + 8953101384119*u^7*x^5 - 
    3542957408035*u^7*x^4 + 658493481910*u^7*x^3 - 60735449940*u^7*x^2 + 5054752976*u^7*x - 9769034620*u^6*x^18 + 79757744286*u^6*x^17 - 183611589624*u^6*x^16 + 14760099094*u^6*x^15 - 863432485518*u^6*x^14 + 
    8857440199162*u^6*x^13 - 26802841533567*u^6*x^12 + 40393969685319*u^6*x^11 - 33514060621040*u^6*x^10 + 13642741398759*u^6*x^9 + 88718904184*u^6*x^8 - 1234545366219*u^6*x^7 - 2388636911383*u^6*x^6 + 
    2889093976456*u^6*x^5 - 1125470631711*u^6*x^4 + 159291799681*u^6*x^3 + 1208403051*u^6*x^2 + 19433947*u^5*x^18 - 27785765162*u^5*x^17 + 181299370656*u^5*x^16 + 170261139944*u^5*x^15 - 4339018397066*u^5*x^14 + 
    15397305752848*u^5*x^13 - 26948884025997*u^5*x^12 + 27602520780517*u^5*x^11 - 17608761203158*u^5*x^10 + 5339634958850*u^5*x^9 + 3431352897505*u^5*x^8 - 4793873172304*u^5*x^7 + 1303972432113*u^5*x^6 + 
    597288883692*u^5*x^5 - 347790526159*u^5*x^4 + 25912752516*u^5*x^3 + 5054752976*u^5*x^2 + 3915714404*u^4*x^18 - 19130266460*u^4*x^17 - 128394041678*u^4*x^16 + 1232209803517*u^4*x^15 - 4115363678137*u^4*x^14 + 
    7607076803370*u^4*x^13 - 9897562274363*u^4*x^12 + 11351465628766*u^4*x^11 - 10319091318853*u^4*x^10 + 3966396317001*u^4*x^9 + 2542797639745*u^4*x^8 - 2991663278912*u^4*x^7 + 688071363704*u^4*x^6 + 
    129016224737*u^4*x^5 - 39828887667*u^4*x^4 - 12488458018*u^4*x^3 + 9777380684*u^3*x^17 - 76153368680*u^3*x^16 + 233958612702*u^3*x^15 - 655012319106*u^3*x^14 + 2543643543864*u^3*x^13 - 6628791261509*u^3*x^12 
    + 9239237667749*u^3*x^11 - 6274114184691*u^3*x^10 + 771197147142*u^3*x^9 + 1862660447774*u^3*x^8 - 1667662741004*u^3*x^7 + 966282708244*u^3*x^6 - 402113493549*u^3*x^5 + 101279671838*u^3*x^4 - 
    16790521994*u^3*x^3 - 3915714404*u^2*x^17 + 25602019327*u^2*x^16 + 52976265578*u^2*x^15 - 773597351281*u^2*x^14 + 2389038208641*u^2*x^13 - 3307929679129*u^2*x^12 + 1993253255915*u^2*x^11 - 
    97288885289*u^2*x^10 - 692272849076*u^2*x^9 + 1170164949900*u^2*x^8 - 1436714513459*u^2*x^7 + 912607970638*u^2*x^6 - 272774885507*u^2*x^5 + 45905961122*u^2*x^4 - 5054752976*u^2*x^3 - 11255490559*u*x^16 + 
    79662796758*u*x^15 - 223520446155*u*x^14 + 240158213737*u*x^13 + 32046321715*u*x^12 - 120793504666*u*x^11 - 151851842502*u*x^10 - 24972226667*u*x^9 + 599502354882*u*x^8 - 641007734402*u*x^7 + 
    261518972785*u*x^6 - 44124307887*u*x^5 + 4636892961*u*x^4 + 1957857202*x^16 - 6676857940*x^15 - 680897875*x^14 + 31660289921*x^13 - 104827273265*x^12 + 209550993529*x^11 - 181816515720*x^10 - 20170506989*x^9 
    + 138166236437*x^8 - 82590054074*x^7 + 15008868759*x^6 + 417860015*x^5);
r:=(x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
